outcome: Hospitalization in the following calendar month
source_cohort: Local clinic monthly records (training set grows with every retrain)

mlops.outcome_backfill: hospitalization_this_month of the next calendar month's MonthlyRecord

retraining_triggers: Calibration slope drifts beyond ±0.15 from 1.0 (automated alert via task_alert_model_drift)
PR-AUC drops below 0.25 for two consecutive weekly reports
Brier score exceeds 0.25 for two consecutive weekly reports
EPF (events per feature) falls below 5 on the next training attempt
≥30 new labelled samples since the last training run
explainability: SHAP LinearExplainer — top-10 features surfaced per prediction in review_queue.html
limitations: Small clinic cohort — CV-AUC may be optimistic below ~200 samples
Outcome label (hospitalization_this_month) is self-reported; coding errors will bias the model
Features derived from monthly summaries; within-month volatility is invisible to the model
